annexure_reference: Annexure F2: Rynette directs Bantjes — Loan account between Strategic and RWD (17 Aug 2021)
pipeline: Neon DB → Graph API body/attachment sync → EML generation → Transport header fetch

envelope.subject: Loan account between Strategic and Regima World Wide

body.preview:
Hi Danie,

We need to do the following to fix the two loans account in Regima World Wide’s books:


Debit      5468/000
Credit     7400/000 with R1 000 000.00 date 25/08/2020


Debit      5468/000
Credit     7400/000 with R310 500.00 date 28/08/

chain_of_custody.extraction_method: Microsoft Graph API v1.0 (client credentials flow)
chain_of_custody.verification: SPF/DKIM/DMARC authentication via internet message headers
chain_of_custody.integrity: SHA-256 hash of generated EML file
